title: PHP Backend Developer — Laravel / Symfony
description: İCT Bilgi Teknolojileri olarak, İstanbul Kartal ofisimizde ofisten çalışacak deneyimli bir PHP Backend Developer ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Kurumsal ölçekte geliştirdiğimiz yazılım projelerinde; temiz kod yazmayı önemseyen, sürdürülebilir mimari bakış açısına sahip ve uzun vadeli ürün geliştirme kültürüne uyum sağlayabilecek bir takım arkadaşıyla çalışmak istiyoruz. Senden Beklediklerimiz En az 5 yıl PHP geliştirme deneyimi Laravel ve/veya Symfony framework’lerinden en az biriyle aktif proje geliştirmiş olmak PostgreSQL veritabanı ile çalışma tecrübesi HTML, CSS, JavaScript ve jQuery konularında bilgi sahibi olmak REST ve SOAP web servisleri konusunda deneyim sahibi olmak Git veya SVN gibi versiyon kontrol sistemlerini aktif kullanmış olmak Temiz kod, performans ve sürdürülebilir mimari konularına önem vermek Seni Öne Çıkaracak Deneyimler Agile / Scrum metodolojileri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Linux tabanlı ortamlarda çalışma deneyimi Sigorta, finans veya kurumsal ölçekli projelerde görev almış olmak Çalışma Şekli İstanbul / Kartal ofisimizde ofisten çalışma Aday Kriterleri En az 5 yıl deneyim Üniversite mezunu Askerlik görevini tamamlamış veya muaf Biz Ne Sunuyoruz? Kurumsal ve uzun soluklu projelerde görev alma fırsatı Deneyimli bir teknik ekiple çalışma ortamı Gerçek kullanıcı ihtiyacına dokunan ürünler geliştirme imkânı Sürdürülebilir yazılım mimarisi ve temiz kod yaklaşımını önemseyen ekip kültürü

title: Backend & DevOps Developer (Freelance / Part-time)
description: Şirket Hakkında ArchiNord, inşaat sektörüne özel multi-tenant SaaS platformları geliştiren bir teknoloji şirketidir. Sunucu altyapısını yönetecek ve backend/entegrasyon tarafında destek verecek bir geliştirici arıyoruz. Ürün geliştirme ekip içinde yürütülmekte olup, bu rol altyapı ve backend entegrasyonlarına odaklıdır. Sorumluluklar AWS (EC2, S3) altyapı yönetimi ve Linux/Ubuntu sunucu bakımı Deployment süreçleri (CI/CD), Nginx, PHP-FPM ve MySQL optimizasyonu Laravel tabanlı API geliştirme ve üçüncü parti entegrasyonlar Otomatik yedekleme ve sistem izleme (monitoring) kurulumu Sistem sürekliliği ve gerektiğinde acil müdahale (on-call) Aranan Nitelikler Senior PHP / Laravel deneyimi AWS ve Linux production ortam deneyimi Nginx, PHP-FPM, MySQL yapılandırma ve performans optimizasyonu RESTful API ve sunucular arası (server-to-server) entegrasyon deneyimi CI/CD (GitHub Actions) ve Docker bilgisi Çalışma Modeli Aylık retainer esasına dayalı, part-time. Tam zamanlı değildir. Altyapıyı kurup sürdürecek, backend entegrasyonlarında destek verecek ve sistem sürekliliğini sağlayacak deneyimli bir profil aranmaktadır. On-call sorumluluğu mevcuttur.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack)-İstanbul
description: Who Are We? Profen, founded in 1995, is a global company that offers products and services to the Communication Technologies, Defense Technologies, Teleport & Satellite Network Services, Media & Broadcasting sectors with its growing R&D center. PROFEN, headquartered in Istanbul, offers innovative and high-tech solutions with its Ankara and Konya offices. PROFEN continues its activities by offering solutions in the following areas: Telecommunication Infrastructures Satellite Ground Segment Systems Data Center Design and Installation Defense Technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or related disciplines 7+ years of professional Java experience in web-based technologies (design, development, and maintenance) Hands-on experience with Java 8, 11, 17, and 21 Proficient in Git and Maven Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Amazon AWS Strong experience with relational databases (RDBMS), preferably PostgreSQL Proven experience in SQL query optimization Full-stack development experience with Angular or React on the front-end Solid understanding of RESTful JSON APIs, SOA, and Event-Driven Architectures Experience with container technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, or OpenShift Familiarity with messaging platforms (Kafka, EMS, ActiveMQ, and/or IBM MQ) Experience with monitoring and alerting tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ElasticSearch Preferably experienced in the aviation MRO / logistics domain Ability to read and understand technical documentation in English Job Description Design and develop required enhancements for the existing visioMAX software Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve software defects and performance issues Write and maintain unit and integration test codes Collaborate closely with users and stakeholders to understand software requirements and user needs Manage cloud-based and on-premise deployment, maintenance, and operational support processes Take an active role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications

title: Software Engineer – Backend and AI R&D
description: We are looking for a talented and motivated Software Engineer to join our R&D team. This position is ideal for an early-career engineer who has a strong interest in backend development, artificial intelligence, computer vision, and model training. At Nevalabs, we develop AI-powered software solutions in areas such as facial recognition, license plate recognition, appearance search, identity verification, object and scene classification, and video analytics. We are looking for a high-potential teammate who is hardworking, detail-oriented, responsible, eager to learn, and willing to grow with our team. Responsibilities Develop and maintain backend software components using Java and/or Python Contribute to scalable, reliable, and maintainable software solutions Work with R&D, AI, frontend, and product teams on new features and product improvements Contribute to AI-related R&D activities, including dataset preparation, data cleaning, model training support, testing, and evaluation Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code Develop unit and integration tests Participate in code reviews and technical discussions Document technical details and development processes Continuously improve technical knowledge in software engineering and AI technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related discipline At least 1 year of professional software development experience (Part-time work experience during university or long-term internship experience may also be considered) Experience with Java and/or Python Good understanding of object-oriented programming Basic knowledge of data structures, algorithms, debugging, and problem-solving Familiarity with RESTful APIs and backend development concepts Knowledge of PostgreSQL and/or MongoDB Experience with Git-based version control systems Interest in artificial intelligence, computer vision, data processing, and model training Strong willingness to learn and improve Detail-oriented and responsible working attitude Ability to work independently and as part of a team Preferred Qualifications Experience with Spring Boot, Spring Data, JPA, or Hibernate Experience with Python backend frameworks such as FastAPI or Flask Familiarity with Docker or containerized development environments Basic knowledge of Linux operating systems and Bash scripting Basic understanding of microservices architecture Experience with unit testing frameworks Familiarity with messaging and caching technologies such as RabbitMQ, ZeroMQ, or Redis Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins is a plus Previous experience or strong interest in AI model training, dataset preparation, or computer vision projects is a plus Experience with Agile development methodologies such as Scrum is a plus Technologies We Use Java, Spring Boot, Gradle Python C++ C# JavaScript, React.js, Backbone.js Git, GitHub MongoDB, PostgreSQL Elasticsearch Docker, Jenkins AI, computer vision, and biometric technologies What We Offer Opportunity to work on real-world AI and computer vision products Hands-on experience in biometric technologies, video analytics, and intelligent security systems A collaborative R&D environment where learning and improvement are encouraged Opportunity to take responsibility and grow technically Experience in both backend software development and AI-focused R&D processes

title: Full Stack Developer (Project-Based Contract - 3 Months)
description: OREDATA is a Digital Transformation & IT Consulting firm with 10+ years of proven expertise and hundreds of successfully implemented projects across the EMEA region. When you join the OREDATA team, you'll be working hand-in-hand with experts focused on tackling digital, operational, analytical & data science challenges with the greatest impact. We foster collaboration with proximity, an agile and autonomous approach and best practices and guiding principles. Read more: https://medium.com/@oredata-engineering Apply and be part of our exciting journey! Role Summary This role is responsible for developing and maintaining scalable full stack applications using modern .NET technologies, contributing to both backend and frontend development processes, and supporting high-traffic enterprise systems with clean and maintainable architectures. Requirements Minimum 5 years of professional software development experience Strong hands-on experience with .NET 9 and modern .NET technologies Proven experience working as a Full Stack Engineer (backend and frontend development) Experience developing and maintaining high-traffic, scalable, and performance-oriented applications Strong understanding of Clean Architecture principles and software design patterns Hands-on experience with Entity Framework and CQRS architecture patterns Strong experience with MSSQL and MongoDB (NoSQL) databases, including query optimization and performance tuning Experience implementing caching solutions using Memcache or similar caching technologies Experience integrating IBM MQ / Message Broker systems within .NET environments Experience working on system integration projects and enterprise application architectures Strong frontend development experience with JavaScript, jQuery, HTML5, and CSS Ability to write clean, scalable, maintainable, and performance-oriented code Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Ability to work independently in remote and project-based environments Strong Experience Experience working on SAP Hybris integration projects using .NET Experience working on enterprise-scale distributed systems Experience with high-performance backend optimization and scalable system design Get to know us If you want to know more about us and what we do, then visit our website: www.oredata.com Why Oredata? Remote working and flexible time off Open communication, flexibility and start-up spirit Learning & Development opportunities for both personal and professional growth Opportunity to get company paid Professional Certificates (Google Cloud Platform, Confluent Kafka, etc) Access to Online Training Platforms (Udemy, Pluralsight, A Cloud Guru, Coursera, etc.) Dynamic work ecosystem where you can take initiative and responsibility Opportunity to work on international projects Private Health Insurance Birthday Leave Policy Kişisel verileriniz işe alım sürecinin yürütülebilmesi amacıyla veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla şirketimiz Oredata Yazılım A.Ş. tarafından işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesi ve haklarınızla ilgili detaylı bilgiye https://oredata.com/personal-data-protection-policy/ bağlantısı üzerinden ulaşabilirsiniz.

title: Backend Developer (Python)
description: About Pure Pure Energy is a private clean-tech organization focusing on commercial optimization of renewable & BESS assets, energy trading, origination, and "hands-on" advisory services. An elite team of international energy professionals, we are committed to become the leading energy services provider around the globe. We make sure that every watt we manage: - contributes to a socially and environmentally friendly future - is economically optimized - promotes market and grid stability. About the Role We’re building the data integration backbone behind Pure’s continental energy operations. We trade and manage portfolios across a growing set of European markets — Germany, Estonia, the Netherlands, the UK, Sweden, Finland and beyond — and the systems you’ll work on are what keep that activity connected, accurate, and fast. You’ll design and build the integration services and data pipelines that bring together market data, counterparty systems, and internal trading and portfolio-management tools. Alongside backend development, you’ll spend part of your time on hands-on data analysis — validating, exploring, and making sense of the data flowing through our systems. You don’t need prior energy-sector experience; we’ll teach you the domain. What matters is that you’re a strong engineer who’s genuinely eager to learn. Responsibilities Design and implement robust, modular APIs that conform to OpenAPI standards, with a core focus on Python, FastAPI, and SQLAlchemy. Build and maintain data integration services connecting external market data providers, counterparties, and internal systems across our European markets. Develop and operate reliable data pipelines and event-driven workflows, with task orchestration handled through Temporal. Perform hands-on data analysis to validate, explore, and quality-check the data moving through our systems. Develop and manage database migrations using Alembic. Write clean, efficient, well-tested code and contribute to prototypes, code reviews, and issue resolution. Maintain clear documentation for the services and integrations you build. Adhere to deadlines to ensure timely delivery. Required Skills and Qualifications Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 2–4 years of backend development experience with Python. Proficiency in SQL (preferably PostgreSQL) and solid data-modeling skills. Experience with FastAPI and tools such as SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, and Alembic. Experience with Pandas and working with data analytically. Strong communication skills and fluent command of English (written and spoken). Ability to work effectively as an individual contributor within a fast-paced, cross-functional team. Genuine willingness to learn the energy domain quickly. Preferred Skills and Qualifications Experience with workflow orchestration tools, ideally Temporal.io (or Airflow, Prefect, or similar). Working knowledge of message brokers and streaming such as Redis and Kafka. Experience with containerization technologies, particularly Docker, and CI/CD best practices. Experience building data integration or real-time data-processing systems. Familiarity with energy markets (day-ahead, intraday, ancillary services) — a plus, not a requirement. Proficiency in German would be an asset. Pure Energy Offers The sunny sides of professionalism and the great spirit of a scale-up. Opportunities for personal and professional development in a field shaping the future of markets. A lean yet challenging working environment orchestrating know-how, responsibility, and “the next thing”. Competitive salary and bonus scheme, and a comprehensive wellness package. How to Apply Ready to be part of the energy revolution and Pure Energy’s growth story? Apply now by sharing your CV, and, if you want to stand out, include a cover letter (yes, we do read them). Join Pure Energy and help us deliver the Power for Good. ÇALIŞAN ADAYI KİŞİSEL VERİLERİNİN İŞLENMESİNE İLİŞKİN AYDINLATMA METNİ I. Veri Sorumlusu Pure Energy Elektrik Tedarik Anonim Şirketi (“Şirket”) olarak 6698 Sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“Kanun”) kapsamında veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla haiz olduğumuz aydınlatma yükümlülüğümüzü yerine getirerek kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesi hakkında sizleri bilgilendirmek isteriz. II. Kişisel Verileri Toplama Yöntemleri ve Hukuki Sebepleri Şirketimiz, kişisel verileri doğrudan çalışan adaylarının doğrudan kendisinden ya da Şirketin iş ortaklarından, çevrimiçi CV paylaşım platformlarından, çalışan adayının pozisyona uygunluk için değerlendirildiği mülakat sonuçlarından, e-posta, posta, faks ve sair iletişim kanalları aracılığıyla işitsel, elektronik veya yazılı olarak; iş başvuru sürecinin yönetilmesi ve icrası, insan kaynakları sürecinin planlanması ve icrası amaçları başta olmak üzere aşağıda belirtilen amaçlar doğrultusunda işlemektedir. Kişisel verileriniz (i) sizlerle bir sözleşme ilişkisi kurmamız veya bu sözleşmeden kaynaklanan ifa yükümlülüğümüz ile doğrudan doğruya ilgili olması kaydıyla, sizlere ait kişisel verilerin işlenmesinin gerekli olması (örneğin sözleşme öncesi müzakere dönemi nedeniyle veri işlenmesi), (ii) hukuki yükümlülüğümüzü yerine getirebilmek için zorunlu olan durumlarda, (iii) çalışan adaylarının temel hak ve özgürlüklerine zarar vermemek kaydıyla Şirket’in meşru menfaatleri doğrultusunda (örneğin özgeçmişinizin ileride uygun pozisyonlarda değerlendirilmek üzere 6 ay süre ile saklanması) ve (iv) ilerleyen süreçlerde gerekli olduğu durumlarda sizlerden talep edeceğimiz açık rıza hukuki sebepleriyle işlenmektedir. III. Kişisel Verileri İşleme Amaçları Yukarıda belirtilen kişisel verileriniz, bu verileri bizlere açıklamanıza konu olan ve aşağıda belirtilen amaçlarla işlenebilecektir: İnsan kaynakları süreçlerinin planlanması ve icrası, çalışan adayı/stajyer/öğrenci seçme ve yerleştirme süreçlerinin yürütülmesi, çalışan adaylarının başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi temel amaçlarıyla, İş başvuru talebinizin ve ilgili pozisyona uygunluğunuzun değerlendirilmesi çerçevesinde işe alım süreçlerinin yürütülmesi, sonuçlandırılması ve bu kapsamda sizinle veya bize referans olarak belirttiğiniz kişilerle iletişime geçilmesi ve tarafımıza paylaştığınız bilgilerin doğrulunun teyidi, iş görüşmeleri esnasında kişinin beyan ettiği tecrübelerinin, eğitim durumunun, yetkinliklerinin araştırma, gözlem ve kaydının yapılması, istihdam edilecek çalışan adayının görevlendirileceği ilgili departmanın iş koşullarına uygun eğitim, nitelik ve becerilerinin mevcudiyetinin tespiti, işle bağlantılı belirli fonksiyonlar açısından özel risklerin tespiti, iş görüşmesinin olumsuz sonuçlanması durumunda ilerleyen dönemlerde oluşabilecek uygun pozisyonlar için değerlendirilmesi, ücret bilgi ve skalasının belirlenmesi, iletişimin sağlanması, Şirketimiz insan kaynakları politikaları ve süreçlerinin planlanması ve icra edilmesi kapsamında; personel temin süreçlerinin yürütülmesi, mükerrer başvuruların takibi, şirket çalışanları için iş akdi ve/veya mevzuattan kaynaklı yükümlülüklerin yerine getirilmesi, çalışanlar için yan haklar ve menfaatlerin planlanması ve icrası. IV. Kişisel Verilerin Aktarılması Şirketimiz, kişisel verilerinizi “bilme gereği” ve “kullanma gereği” ilkelerine uygun olarak ve gerekli teknik ve idari güvenlik tedbirlerini alarak işlemeye özen göstermektedir. İş faaliyetlerinin yürütülmesi veya denetimi, iş sürekliliğinin sağlanması, dijital altyapıların işletilmesi farklı paydaşlarla sürekli veri akışını zaruri kıldığı için işlediğimiz kişisel verileri belirli amaçlarla üçüncü kişilerle aktarmak durumundayız. Kişisel verileriniz, yukarıda belirtilen amaçların gerçekleştirilmesi doğrultusunda ve bu amaçların yerine getirilmesi ile sınırlı olarak; hissedarlarımızla, iş ortaklarımızla, beyan ettiğiniz bilgilerin teyidi amacıyla referans olarak belirtilen kişilerle, bilişim altyapımızı sağlayan, işleten veya hizmet sunan iş ortaklarımızla ve hizmet sağlayıcılarımızla, kanunen yetkili kamu kurumları ve özel kişi veya kuruluşlar ile, veri sorumlusunun meşru menfaatinin gerektirdiği hallerde özel olarak belirlenecek üçüncü kişiler ile işbu aydınlatma metninde belirtilen amaçlarla sınırlı olarak paylaşılabilecek, yurt içinde işlenebilecektir. V. İlgili Kişinin Hakları Kişisel verisi işlenen kişi olarak, Kanunun ilgili kişinin haklarını düzenleyen 11. maddesi kapsamındaki taleplerinizi (kişisel veri işlemeyi öğrenme, işlemeyle ilgili bilgi talep etme, işlemenin amaca uygunluğunu öğrenme, aktarım yapılan kişileri bilme, eksik veya yanlış işlemelerin düzeltilmesini isteme, silme veya yok edilmesini isteme, otomatik tüm işlemlerin üçüncü kişilere bildirilmesini isteme, analize itiraz etme, zararın giderilmesini talep etme) Veri Sorumlusuna Başvuru Usul ve Esasları Hakkında Tebliğe göre kullanmak için kvkk@pureenergy.com.tr ile iletişime geçebilir veya https://pureenergy.com.tr/kvkk adresi üzerinden erişebileceğiniz formu kullanabilirsiniz.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Fullstack Developer (React + Python / Internal Systems) Location: Remote — US-based company with a development team in Europe Availability: Preferences for candidates within -5 / +3 hours of GMT Team: Development Reports to: Systems Architect Type: Full-Time Intro Want to join a team of visionary creators, entrepreneurs, and scientists to help grow a global wellness brand? You are in luck! We are looking for a Fullstack Developer (React, Next.js + Python / Internal Systems) to help evolve and maintain our internal digital systems, with a particular focus on our WooCommerce-based e-commerce infrastructure and subscription platform. We are Wonderfeel, a longevity-focused wellness biosciences company. Founded in Silicon Valley in 2018, Wonderfeel set out to accelerate wellness technologies by combining the wonders of nature and science. Our products leverage the magic of the body’s own regenerative systems, empowering individuals with safe solutions to help them live long, healthy lives. At Wonderfeel, we’re not just redefining wellness; we’re reimagining what’s possible for human potential! And we’re seeking the right people to join our team, who share our vision, and are willing to bring the exceptional drive, skills, and ambition to succeed. The Role We’re looking for a Fullstack Developer with strong React and Python expertise to help evolve our internal digital systems. Today, our operations run on WooCommerce and WordPress. In the short term, you’ll help maintain and stabilize this environment. In the long term, you’ll help architect and build a new React + Python–based platform , working closely with our Lead Senior Developer, Systems Architect, and DevOps Engineer (all Europe-based). This role offers a balance of supporting what’s in place today while contributing heavily to what we’re building next. What You’ll Do Help build modern React frontend features and internal apps in collaboration with our Lead Senior Developer Help develop backend Python services, APIs , and integrations alongside our Lead Senior Developer Implement systems supporting subscriptions, customer accounts, internal tools, and business automation Build dashboards and lightweight admin tools used by operations, marketing, customer support, and product teams Integrate with CRMs, fulfillment partners, analytics tools, and other platforms using REST APIs and webhooks What You Bring (Must-Have Qualifications) 3+ years of fullstack development experience Strong proficiency with React (hooks, component patterns, performance) Strong proficiency with Python (backend services, APIs, integrations) Experience integrating REST APIs and working with webhook-based workflows Strong understanding of MySQL/PostgreSQL or similar databases Solid knowledge of HTML, CSS/SCSS, and modern JavaScript Git proficiency and experience with collaborative workflows (PRs, reviews, branching) Hands-on use of AI tools (Copilot, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity) Ability to work autonomously and asynchronously in a remote European time-zone environment Strong written and verbal communication skills Fluent or Advanced English Bonus Points (Nice-to-Haves) Not required, strong React & Python experience is most important. PHP & jQuery knowledge, WordPress & WooCommerce experience Familiarity with Zoho, Metorik, fulfillment APIs, analytics tools Experience with payment gateways or subscription billing systems Performance profiling and production debugging experience Understanding of PCI, HIPAA, or other compliance frameworks Interest in AI-driven development and automation What We Offer Competitive salary + stock options 100% remote flexibility within European time zones A high-impact role shaping the next generation of our digital systems A collaborative, supportive, science-driven work culture The opportunity to build systems used daily by customers, operations, and leadership We welcome applicants from diverse backgrounds and encourage you to apply even if you don’t meet every single requirement. If you’re enthusiastic about React, Next.js, Python, AI development tools and building systems that matter, we’d love to meet you.
